_meta.name: obbba-1099
_meta.description: REPLAY FIXTURE — the 2026 OBBBA 1099-NEC threshold change ($600 -> $2,000 for payments after 31 Dec 2025). Two parts: the seed state AS IT STOOD BEFORE the change (only the $600 tax_year=2025 row, no 2026 row yet), and the law-change signal a watched source would emit. Feeding these to detect() must produce exactly ONE seed-diff adding the 2026 $2,000 row — the canonical LOOP-2 acceptance test (BACKLOG LOOP-2 acceptance (a)). Citation is the OBBBA/IRS reporting-threshold source.
_meta.citation_note: OBBBA §70433 raised the 1099-NEC/MISC reporting threshold to $2,000 for payments made after 31 Dec 2025, inflation-indexed from 2027.

signals.summary: OBBBA raised the 1099-NEC reporting threshold from $600 to $2,000 for payments made after 31 Dec 2025 (inflation-indexed from 2027). Modeled as a NEW tax_year 2026 row so 2025 filings still compute at $600 (Roadmap 3c: old periods keep old law).
